name: Panther Metals PLC
description: Panther Metals PLC is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the discovery of world-class gold and base metal deposits in Tier 1 mining jurisdictions. The company's primary focus is on its highly prospective portfolio of projects in Ontario, Canada, including the Obonga and Dalles Lake projects, as well as holding significant investments in Australia. Panther Metals utilizes modern exploration techniques to identify and advance high-potential targets, aiming to deliver substantial value to its shareholders through discovery and strategic project advancement.
